name: Host Command Proxy
description: Proxy commands (gh, git, aws, ...) from container to host machine. Requires cmd2host daemon on host. v1.4 adds the cmd2host-proxy transparent dispatch binary so natural CLI invocations reach the host through the project's allowed operation templates.

commands.description: Comma-separated list of commands to proxy. Each entry becomes a /usr/local/bin/<command> symlink to cmd2host-proxy, which reverse-matches the user's argv against the project's allowed operation templates. Default 'gh' preserves existing setups; opt into 'gh,git,aws' (or any subset) when you want raw-argv transparent dispatch for additional CLIs.

installMcpServer.description: Install cmd2host-mcp (MCP server for AI agent integration)

connectionMode.description: Connection mode to host daemon: 'tcp' (default) or 'unix' (for --network none containers)
